[Photo] 🤝 **Unity Network - Scout & Runner Explained**

Two roles. One mission.
Verifiable telecom connectivity at scale.

Scouts:
• Discover & verify numbers
• Report verified connectivity
• Earn fixed UP credits

Runners:
• Validate Scout-verified routes
• Validated calls logged automatically
• Rewards applied instantly
